name: Game Day Sports Bar Carousel
aesthetic: High-energy sports hype — team colors, bold sans-serif headlines, team logos, court/field background energy, bar atmosphere, countdown vibes. Designed for playoff/championship moments.

fonts.display_bold: Bebas Neue / Archivo Black (huge uppercase headlines)

theme_vars.--team-1-color: primary team color (e.g., red for Raptors)
theme_vars.--team-2-color: opponent team color (e.g., wine for Cavs)
theme_vars.--accent: highlight color (usually white or accent team color)

slides.subject: Court/arena background with dark overlay; team 1 logo top-left, team 2 logo top-right; huge 'VS' center; game time and venue below; watch location (e.g., 'JURASSIC PARK' or stadium name); 'GAMEDAY' or countdown text bottom.
Restaurant hero photo with dark overlay; graffiti headline 'WHERE TO EAT'; restaurant name in large bold text; neighbourhood/distance from venue; 2-3 signature dishes or vibe bullets.
Packed bar/crowd photo or team celebration image; headline 'BRING THE ENERGY'; tagline about the watch party atmosphere; CTA copy about timing.
Dark bg with BiteMap logo, 'FOUND THE SPOT' banner, app badges.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'FOUND THE SPOT' / BiteMap logo / tagline / app badges

inputs_required.watchLocation: string — outdoor watch area or venue section (e.g., 'JURASSIC PARK')
inputs_required.distance: string — distance from venue or walking direction
inputs_required.restaurantImageUrl: string — restaurant hero photo (dish or interior)
inputs_required.bullets: string[] — 2-3 signature items or vibe words
inputs_required.crowdImageUrl: string — bar crowd or celebration photo
inputs_required.teamColor1: string — hex color for team 1 (e.g., '#CE1141' for Raptors)
inputs_required.teamColor2: string — hex color for team 2 (e.g., '#6F2DA8' for Cavs)

copy_rules: Headlines are UPPERCASE, short (4-8 letters), bold and energetic
Time and venue are factual, no hype language needed
Restaurant copy is specific — name real items, never generic ('great food' banned)
Watch location (Jurassic Park, etc.) gets its own line — it's the hook
Crowd/energy slide uses one-word vibes + short sentences
asset_rules: Team logos should be clean, high-contrast, 200x200px minimum
Background court/field image should feel energetic — crowd, lighting, or action
Restaurant photo should be food close-up or packed bar, not generic interior
Crowd image should show energy — packed stands, cheering, hands up
Min 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
use_when: Any playoff or championship game at a host city during FIFA 2026 window
Local watch parties (Jurassic Park, Maple Leaf Square, outdoor viewing)
Where restaurant/bar tie-in is strong (sports bars, pre-game dining)
High-engagement moments — game day 2-4 hours before tipoff
